prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年理科（物理类）最低位次分别为约639名→310名→287名→372名→346名，整体呈波动中前移趋势，近3年稳定在300–400名区间；2025年基准位次约346名；该校在云南省理科（物理类）招生计划：2021年35人、2022年34人、2023年32人、2024年42人、2025年44人，呈逐年小幅扩招趋势；2026年计划增至58人，较2025年扩招约31.8%，扩招幅度较大，竞争有所加剧。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 复旦大学为985、211、双一流高校，软科中国大学主榜2026年排名第5位（Top5），属全国顶尖高校层次，对高分考生吸引力极强；2026年高考周期声誉评价偏负面（主要涉及师德师风、学校管理类事件），但2025年周期偏正面（科研成果类）；抖音热度排名第4（高热），短视频曝光量极大，报考关注度持续高企；历史投档异常信号在2022–2023年有中高关注度，但未出现持续断档；复旦大学拥有A+学科12个（中国史、中国语言文学、哲学、政治学、数学、新闻传播学、物理学、理论经济学、生物学、马克思主义理论、临床医学、公共卫生与预防医学等），A-及以上学科共计27个，远超10个，学科实力极强，对理科考生吸引力突出。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等工科专业持续高热推荐，与复旦相关学科（计算机科学与技术A、电子科学与技术A）高度匹配；本省2026年物理类考生数估算约22.9万人，较2025年17.3万人增长约32.3%，竞争加剧；复旦大学位于上海市（东部沿海），在云南省招生占比极小（2025年约0.9%），跨省报考热度受地域偏好影响有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次346名、2026年大幅扩招约31.8%及本省物理类考生增长约32.3%，供需两端同步扩张；考虑复旦顶尖层次对高分考生的持续吸引力及抖音高热关注度，小幅上调至422名；预测最低位次约422名，区间372–472名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 数学类（拔尖学生培养基地）
- 经济学类（拔尖学生培养基地）
- 工科试验班（新工科拔尖班，含智能科学与技术、人工智能）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 软件工程（国家示范性软件学院）
- 自然科学试验班（拔尖学生培养基地，含物理学、化学等）
- 经济管理试验班（统计、运筹与AI）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 技术科学试验班（交叉科学类，含材料物理、环境科学等）
- 工科试验班（智能材料与未来能源创新学院）
- 核工程与核技术。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间372–472名内，建议以二档专业为主力填报、一档专业冲刺、三档专业保底；位次明显优于区间下限（如370名以内）可重点冲刺数学类、经济学类等一档王牌专业；位次接近区间上限（如470名左右）应以三档专业保底为主。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for science (physics category) were approximately 639 → 310 → 287 → 372 → 346, showing a fluctuating but generally advancing trend, stabilizing in the 300–400 range in recent three years; the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 346; the university's enrollment plan for science (physics category) in Yunnan Province: 35 in 2021, 34 in 2022, 32 in 2023, 42 in 2024, 44 in 2025, showing a gradual small-scale expansion trend; the 2026 plan increases to 58, an expansion of about 31.8% compared to 2025, a relatively large expansion, intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Fudan University is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university, ranked 5th (Top 5) in the 2026 Soft Science Chinese University Main Ranking, belonging to the top-tier national universities, strongly attracting high-scoring candidates; the reputation evaluation for the 2026 college entrance examination cycle is somewhat negative (mainly involving teacher ethics, school management incidents), but the 2025 cycle was somewhat positive (scientific research achievements); Douyin popularity ranks 4th (high heat), with extremely high short video exposure, and sustained high application attention; historical admission anomaly signals had medium-high attention in 2022–2023, but no continuous gaps occurred; Fudan University has 12 A+ disciplines (Chinese History, Chinese Language and Literature, Philosophy, Political Science, Mathematics, Journalism and Communication, Physics, Theoretical Economics, Biology, Marxist Theory, Clinical Medicine, Public Health and Preventive Medicine, etc.), and a total of 27 disciplines at A- or above, far exceeding 10, with extremely strong disciplinary strength, strongly attracting science candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to be highly recommended, highly matching Fudan's related disciplines (Computer Science and Technology A, Electronic Science and Technology A); the estimated number of physics category candidates in the province for 2026 is about 229,000, an increase of about 32.3% from 173,000 in 2025, intensifying competition; Fudan University is located in Shanghai (eastern coast), with a very small proportion of enrollment in Yunnan Province (about 0.9% in 2025), and cross-province application heat is limitedly affected by regional preferences.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Combining the 2025 baseline ranking of 346, the significant expansion of about 31.8% in 2026, and the increase of about 32.3% in physics category candidates in the province, both supply and demand expand simultaneously; considering Fudan's top-tier level's sustained attraction to high-scoring candidates and high Douyin attention, slightly adjust upward to 422; predicted minimum ranking about 422, range 372–472.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult)
- Mathematics (Top-Notch Student Training Base)
- Economics (Top-Notch Student Training Base)
- Engineering Pilot Class (New Engineering Top-Notch Class, including Intelligent Science and Technology, Artificial Intelligence).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Software Engineering (National Model Software College)
- Natural Science Pilot Class (Top-Notch Student Training Base, including Physics, Chemistry, etc.)
- Economics and Management Pilot Class (Statistics, Operations Research and AI).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy)
- Technical Science Pilot Class (Interdisciplinary Science, including Materials Physics, Environmental Science, etc.)
- Engineering Pilot Class (Smart Materials and Future Energy Innovation College)
- Nuclear Engineering and Nuclear Technology.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If ranking is within the predicted range of 372–472, it is recommended to mainly fill in Tier 2 majors as the primary choice, Tier 1 majors as a reach, and Tier 3 majors as safety; if ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 370), focus on reaching for Tier 1 flagship majors like Mathematics and Economics; if ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (e.g., around 470), mainly rely on Tier 3 majors as safety.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for liberal arts (history category) were approximately 82 → 82 → 86 → 62 → 56, showing an overall forward trend, with continuous increases in the last three years. The baseline ranking for 2025 is about 56. The enrollment plan for Fudan University in Yunnan Province for liberal arts (history category) was: 14 in 2021, 14 in 2022, 14 in 2023, 10 in 2024, and 8 in 2025, showing a gradual reduction. The 2026 plan remains at 8, with a stable enrollment scale.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Fudan University is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science Chinese University Main Ranking, it ranks 5th (Top 5), placing it among the top national universities, which strongly attracts high-scoring liberal arts students. During the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, its reputation evaluation is slightly negative (mainly involving teacher ethics incidents), but in the 2025 cycle, it was slightly positive (scientific research achievements). Its Douyin popularity ranks 4th (high heat), with extremely high short video exposure, indicating sustained high application attention. Fudan University has outstanding liberal arts advantages: Chinese Language and Literature A+, Journalism and Communication A+, Philosophy A+, Political Science A+, Chinese History A+, Theoretical Economics A+, Marxist Theory A+, etc., with a total of 27 A- and above disciplines, strongly attracting liberal arts candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law is showing signs of divergence and caution, while Journalism and Communication is clearly being discouraged. However, Fudan's Law (A-) and Journalism and Communication (A+) are both top-tier disciplines, which can partially offset the discouraging effects of industry trends. The estimated number of history category candidates in the province for 2026 is about 149,000, an increase of approximately 32.3% from 112,000 in 2025, intensifying competition. Fudan University is located in Shanghai (eastern coast), and its enrollment proportion for liberal arts in Yunnan Province is very small, so cross-province application enthusiasm is limitedly affected by regional preferences.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 56, the 2026 enrollment plan remaining unchanged, and a 32.3% increase in history category candidates in the province; considering intensified competition and the strong appeal of Fudan's top liberal arts disciplines, a slight upward adjustment to 58 is made. The predicted minimum ranking is about 58, with a range of 8–108.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Economics (Elite Student Training Base)
- Humanities Experimental Class (Elite Student Training Base, including Chinese Language and Literature, History, Philosophy)
- Law (Excellent Legal Talent Base).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Journalism and Communication (Excellent Journalism Talent Program)
- Social Sciences Experimental Class (School of International Relations and Public Affairs, including Administrative Management, International Politics, etc.).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)
- Social Sciences Experimental Class (School of Social Development and Public Policy, including Sociology, Social Work)
- History (including History Boya Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: With rankings within the predicted range of 8–108, given that Fudan's liberal arts rankings are already at an extremely high provincial level, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main force and use Tier 1 majors as a sprint. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 30), one can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors such as Economics and Humanities Experimental Class. If the ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (e.g., around 100), Tier 3 majors should be used as a safety net.
